name: We Drive U
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER keyword searches for 'WE DRIVE U', 'WE DRIVE', and 'WE DRIVE *' returned no Michigan match; nearest is WE DRIVE YOU RIDE TRANSPORTATION LLC (USDOT 2315388, Milwaukee WI) - different state. National WeDriveU Inc (HQ Burlingame, CA; subsidiary of Mobico) has no Grand Blanc office. Address 660 Morningside Dr appears residential per Redfin listing - consistent with a small sole-proprietor/owner-operated transport. Michigan LARA MiBusiness Registry could not be searched via WebFetch (CAPTCHA/403). MDOT licensed bus carrier list does not include 'We Drive U' or any Grand Blanc carrier.

name: Admired Transportation Svc
registry_source: Colorado SOS business search - no record found via indirect search
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'ADMIRED TRANSPORTATION' and wildcard '*ADMIRED*' returned no Colorado carriers (only ADMIRED FIRST in Novi, MI and ADMIRED RESIDENTIAL SERVICES LLC in Salem, OH). Source record has no hq/address - making identification harder. Not found on Colorado HCPF NEMT provider list searches, BBB, OpenCorporates, or Bizapedia results. May be operating as a sole proprietor (no LLC/Inc) or under a slightly different DBA. Colorado SOS direct search not retrievable via WebFetch.

name: A's Transportation Svc LLC
registry_source: Mississippi SOS business search - direct lookup blocked (HTTP 403)
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'A'S TRANSPORTATION' and wildcards '*A'S TRANSPORT*' and '*A'S TRANS*' returned no Mississippi carriers. Easily confused with A&S Transportation (National Express subsidiary, charter schools - not the same entity). 1750 Ellis Ave, Jackson MS 39204 is a real commercial-adjacent address in south Jackson. Likely a small intrastate operator (school activity bus, daycare, or NEMT). Mississippi SOS at corp.sos.ms.gov blocked WebFetch. Not visible on MS-APT directory results. Possibly dissolved or never registered as LLC despite name.

name: Randy Roloff Special Needs
registry_source: Washington Corporations and Charities Filing System (ccfs.sos.wa.gov) - no public record retrieved via WebFetch
notes: No USDOT (likely intrastate). FMCSA SAFER searches for 'ROLOFF' and 'RANDY ROLOFF' returned no Washington carriers (only JOSEPH ROLOFF in Puyallup WA, USDOT 1946101 - different person). PO Box 1050, Centralia WA 98531 is consistent with a small DBA or sole-prop providing specialized special-needs student transport (often van-based, McKinney-Vento/IDEA/IEP routes contracted to private operators). Likely registered as sole proprietorship under owner name rather than LLC, which would not appear in WA SOS corporate registry. Centralia/Chehalis Pupil Transportation Coop is the local entity that contracts such services. Could not confirm in OSPI student transportation directory (PDF binary unreadable via WebFetch).

name: Road Runner Svc
